content:
Hydromea, an EPFL spin-off, offers the LUMA optical modem which supports data rates up to 10 Mbps over 50 meters at depths of 6,000 m.
Acoustic communication is generally the most energy-efficient choice for longer ranges, and we strongly recommend it for industrial deployments.
Here are some options:
